vitals.terrain: desert, flat start, major climb, rolling hills, descent

course_description.overview: Desert gran fondo along the Jordanian border through the Great Crater and up the legendary Scorpion Ascent (Mt. Ayit), starting and finishing in Eilat on the Red Sea. Preceded by a short prologue or time trial on Friday, main 140 km event on Saturday.

key_segments.name: Flat Start
key_segments.description: Initial flat section along the coast north of Eilat.

key_segments.name: Mt. Ayit (Scorpion Ascent)
key_segments.description: Main climb averaging 6.7% with ramps to 14%.

key_segments.name: Final Descent
key_segments.description: Fast descent on wide, smooth roads back to Eilat.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging winter desert ride with a decisive 4.2 km climb at 6.7%, followed by 60 km of rolling exposure and a rewarding fast descent. Total 1400 m elevation over 140 km tests endurance in arid conditions.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Eilat's airport or nearby Ovda; event at Red Sea resort town.
logistics.registration_details: Entry ~€60, discounts available; UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier with age-group rankings; limited tickets.
logistics.bike_logistics: Race-standard setup: frame plates, bib numbers, MyLaps chips; mechanics available in packages.
logistics.local_considerations: Winter event with sunrise starts (~7 AM), chilly desert mornings warming to 25°C; closed roads, pros at start; Hebrew/English.

final_verdict.one_liner: Rare winter desert gran fondo with pro-level organization and stunning Negev climbs.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Endurance road cyclists seeking UCI qualifiers, desert adventure, and Red Sea recovery in mild winter weather.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for unique scenery, quality racing, and value as a growing international event.
pro_tips: Layer for cold desert starts, hydrate aggressively in dry air.
Train for 7% climbs with wind exposure.
Book early for UCI qualifier spots and hotel packages.
Enjoy post-race Red Sea vibes and potential pro sightings.
